metadata.summary: A simple tools for container network configuration using tc command.

classes.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.tccmd_wrapper.TCCmdWrapper

methods.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.tccmd_wrapper.TCCmdWrapper.set_bandwidth
documentation:
Set bandwidth limit between two containers.
Args:
    - container1 (str) : container name or id
    - container2 (str) : container name or id
    - bandwidth (int) : bandwidth limit
    - bandwidth_unit (str, optional) : bandwidth unit.
    Default is "mbit".
    - _run_with_sudo (bool, optional) : run command with sudo.
    Default is None.

tc command wrapper for setting bandwidth
limits between docker containers.
This class is a singleton,
so only one instance will be created.
Args:
    - run_with_sudo (bool, optional) : run all commands with sudo.
    Default is False.

classes.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.dockercmd_wrapper.DockerCmdWrapper

methods.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.dockercmd_wrapper.DockerCmdWrapper.run_cmd
documentation:
Run docker command.
Args:
    - cmd (str) : docker command to run

methods.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.dockercmd_wrapper.DockerCmdWrapper.check_container
documentation:
Check if container exists.

Args:
    container (str): container name or id
    _run_with_sudo (bool, optional): run command with sudo.
    Defaults to None.

Raises:
    e: subprocess.CalledProcessError if container not found

methods.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.dockercmd_wrapper.DockerCmdWrapper.get_container
documentation:
Get all containers with given prefix.

Args:
    - prefix (str, optional): container name prefix. Default is None.

docker command wrapper for managing docker containers.
This class is a singleton, so only one instance will be created.
Args:
    - run_with_sudo (bool, optional) : run all commands with sudo.
    Default is False.

functions.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.base.singleton
documentation:
Singleton decorator for classes.
Note: This decorator will call __init__ method
every time the instance is created.

functions.name: contcfg.cmd_wrapper.base.exec_cmd
documentation:
Execute a command.

Args:
    - cmd (str): command to execute
    - _run_with_sudo (bool, optional): run command with sudo.
    Defaults to None.
    - bash (bool, optional): run command with bash.
    Defaults to True.

class_variables.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.msg.CtrlAction.SET_BANDWIDTH
documentation: set bandwidth limit between two containers

class_variables.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.msg.CtrlAction.ADD_CONTAINER
documentation: add a new container to monitor

class_variables.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.msg.CtrlAction.DEL_CONTAINER
documentation: remove a container from monitoring

class_variables.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.msg.CtrlAction.STOP
documentation: stop monitoring and adjusting network

classes.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_controller.ConNetController

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_controller.ConNetController.add_container
documentation:
Add container to the network controller.
Args:
    - container (str) : container name or id

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_controller.ConNetController.del_container
documentation:
Delete container from the network controller.
Args:
    - container (str) : container name or id

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_controller.ConNetController.find_all_containers
documentation: Find all containers with given prefix.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_controller.ConNetController.stop
documentation: Stop the client.

Container network controller message sender.
This class is used to send control messages
to the network controller.
Args:
    - socket_path (str) : path to the unix socket

classes.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommServer

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommServer.start
documentation:
Start the server. This method will start the server
and wait for incoming messages, and put
them in the queue.
Args:
    - q (Queue) : asyncio.Queue object to put incoming messages

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommServer._recvall
documentation:
Receive n bytes from the reader.
Args:
    - reader : asyncio.StreamReader object
    - n (int) : number of bytes to receive

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommServer._check_path
documentation: Check if the socket path exists, and remove it if it does.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommServer._handle_client
documentation: Handle the client connection.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommServer._initiate_stop
documentation: Initiate the stop event.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommServer.stop
documentation: Stop the server.

Network control communication server.
This class is used to create a unix socket server
to receive control messages from clients.
Typically, only one client will connect to the server.
Args:
    - socket_path (str) : path to the unix socket

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommClient.send
documentation: Send data to the server.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.comm.NetCtrlCommClient.stop
documentation:
Stop the connection. This method will send a stop message
to the server and close the connection.

functions.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_server.all_pairs_iter
documentation:
Generate all pairs from a list. If paticular is given,
generate pairs including paticular.

classes.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_server.ConNetServer

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_server.ConNetServer._monitor_and_adjust_network
documentation: Monitor and adjust network bandwidth between containers.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_server.ConNetServer._periodic_clock
documentation: Periodic clock to trigger network adjustment.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_server.ConNetServer.start
documentation: start monitoring and adjusting network.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_server.ConNetServer._show_bandwidth_limits
documentation: Show bandwidth limits between containers.

methods.name: contcfg.container_net_ctrl.container_net_server.ConNetServer._set_bandwidth_limit
documentation:
Set bandwidth limit between two containers.
Args:
    - container1 (str) : container name or id
    - container2 (str) : container name or id
    - bandwidth (int, optional) : bandwidth limit. Default is None.

Container network controller class.
This class is used to control network bandwidth
between docker containers.
Args:
    - min_rate (int) : minimum rate in mbit
    - max_rate (int) : maximum rate in mbit
    - interval (int) : interval in seconds
    - prefix (str, optional) : container name prefix.
    Default is None.
    - _run_with_sudo (bool, optional) : run all commands with sudo.
    Default is False.
